name: Golden Retriever
description: The Golden Retriever is a sturdy, medium-large gundog known for its dense, lustrous coat of gold that gives the breed its name.

name: German Shepherd
description: The German Shepherd is a large, agile, muscular dog of noble character and high intelligence, capable of learning commands for many tasks.

name: Labrador Retriever
description: The Labrador Retriever is a strongly built, medium-sized, short-coupled dog that is athletic and well-balanced. It is the most popular breed in many countries.

name: Poodle
description: The Poodle is an exceptionally smart and active dog available in three size varieties. It is known for its curly hypoallergenic coat and elegant appearance.

name: Bulldog
description: The Bulldog is a medium-sized breed with a thick-set, low-slung body and massive short-faced head. Known for its loose-jointed, shuffling gait and gentle disposition.

name: Beagle
description: The Beagle is a small scent hound originally bred for hunting hare. It is a popular pet due to its size, good temper, and lack of inherited health problems.

name: Rottweiler
description: The Rottweiler is a robust working breed of great strength descended from the mastiffs of the Roman legions. A gentle playmate and protector within the family.

name: Dachshund
description: The Dachshund is a short-legged, long-bodied hound-type dog breed originally bred to scent, chase, and flush out badgers and other burrow-dwelling animals.

name: Shiba Inu
description: The Shiba Inu is the smallest of the six original Japanese spitz breeds. An ancient breed with a bold, spirited personality and fox-like appearance.

name: Akita
description: The Akita is a large, powerful, and alert breed with a noble and intimidating presence. Originally used for guarding royalty and nobility in feudal Japan.

name: Chow Chow
description: The Chow Chow is a powerful, compactly built dog with a lion-like mane and distinctive blue-black tongue. One of the world's oldest dog breeds.

name: Shar Pei
description: The Shar Pei is an ancient Chinese breed known for its deep wrinkles and blue-black tongue. Originally bred as a guard dog and fighter.

name: Pekingese
description: The Pekingese is a compact toy companion of regal bearing and a distinctive rolling gait. Bred for centuries to be the cherished companions of Chinese emperors.

name: Shih Tzu
description: The Shih Tzu is a lively, charming toy dog with a long flowing double coat. Bred solely to be a companion, this breed has been a lap dog since ancient times.

name: Lhasa Apso
description: The Lhasa Apso is a thousand-year-old breed that served as sentinel dogs at palaces and monasteries in the Himalayas. Hardy, confident, and surprisingly tough.

name: Tibetan Mastiff
description: The Tibetan Mastiff is a massive, imposing guardian breed with a thick double coat and a lion-like mane. An ancient breed used to protect flocks and homes in Tibet.

name: Basenji
description: The Basenji is a small, graceful hound from Africa known as the barkless dog. It produces an unusual yodel-like sound due to its unusually shaped larynx.

name: Rhodesian Ridgeback
description: The Rhodesian Ridgeback is a large, muscular hound known for the distinctive ridge of hair running along its back. Originally bred to hunt lions in Africa.

name: Saluki
description: The Saluki is one of the oldest known breeds, prized for its grace, speed, and endurance. Used for thousands of years by Arab nomads to hunt gazelles.

name: Afghan Hound
description: The Afghan Hound is an elegant, aristocratic sighthound with a long, silky coat. An ancient breed from the mountains of Afghanistan, known for its independent nature.

name: Borzoi
description: The Borzoi is a graceful, tall Russian sighthound originally bred by the aristocracy for wolf hunting. Known for its elegant, silky coat and calm demeanor.

name: Samoyed
description: The Samoyed is a fluffy white spitz breed with a perpetual smile. Bred by the Samoyede people of Siberia for herding reindeer and pulling sleds.

name: Siberian Husky
description: The Siberian Husky is a medium-sized working sled dog bred by the Chukchi people of northeastern Asia. Known for striking blue or multi-colored eyes.

name: Alaskan Malamute
description: The Alaskan Malamute is a powerful freight-hauling sled dog bred by the Mahlemut Inuit people. One of the oldest Arctic sled dogs.

name: Australian Shepherd
description: The Australian Shepherd is a lean, tough ranch dog despite its name developed in the western United States. Known for its striking merle coat and bright eyes.

name: Border Collie
description: The Border Collie is widely regarded as the most intelligent dog breed. A workaholic herding dog from the Anglo-Scottish border region.

name: Cavalier King Charles Spaniel
description: The Cavalier King Charles Spaniel is a gentle, affectionate toy spaniel with a silky coat. Named after King Charles II who was devoted to the breed.

name: Cocker Spaniel
description: The Cocker Spaniel is a merry, well-balanced sporting dog with long, lush ears and a wagging tail. Originally bred as a hunting dog for woodcock.

name: Dalmatian
description: The Dalmatian is a graceful, medium-large breed known for its unique spotted coat. Historically used as a carriage dog and firehouse mascot.

name: Doberman Pinscher
description: The Doberman Pinscher is a sleek, powerful, fearless, and fast dog. Developed by Karl Friedrich Louis Dobermann as a personal protection dog in Germany.

name: Great Dane
description: The Great Dane is one of the tallest dog breeds in the world. Despite its imposing size, it is known as a gentle giant with a friendly, patient nature.

name: Irish Setter
description: The Irish Setter is a high-spirited gundog known for its stunning mahogany or chestnut red coat. A rollicking companion with a sweet and trainable nature.

name: Italian Greyhound
description: The Italian Greyhound is a slender, graceful toy breed that is a miniature version of the Greyhound. Prized as a companion for over two millennia.

name: Jack Russell Terrier
description: The Jack Russell Terrier is a small, energetic breed that was developed for fox hunting. Known for its fearless character and boundless energy.

name: Maltese
description: The Maltese is a gentle, playful, and charming toy breed with a luxurious white silk coat. One of the most ancient toy breeds, dating back over 2000 years.

name: Newfoundland
description: The Newfoundland is a massive, powerful working dog with a sweet, patient disposition. Famous for its lifesaving instincts and exceptional swimming ability.

name: Papillon
description: The Papillon is a small, elegant toy spaniel named for its butterfly-like ear fringes. Despite its dainty appearance, it is a hardy and athletic companion.

name: Pomeranian
description: The Pomeranian is a cocky, animated companion with an extravagant coat. A spitz breed descended from large sled dogs, now miniaturized into a tiny package.

name: Pug
description: The Pug is a beloved toy companion with a wrinkly, short-muzzled face and curled tail. An ancient breed from China cherished as a companion of Chinese emperors.

name: Saint Bernard
description: The Saint Bernard is a giant, powerful alpine rescue dog famous for saving travelers in the Swiss Alps. Known for its gentle, watchful temperament.

name: Standard Schnauzer
description: The Standard Schnauzer is a robust, squarely built, medium-sized dog with a wiry coat and distinctive beard and eyebrows. An excellent watchdog and companion.

name: Scottish Terrier
description: The Scottish Terrier is a small, compact, sturdy terrier with a distinctive profile and wiry coat. Known for its dignified, independent, and sometimes stubborn nature.

name: Weimaraner
description: The Weimaraner is a graceful, athletic gundog with a distinctive silver-gray coat. Originally bred for big-game hunting by German nobility.

name: Whippet
description: The Whippet is a medium-sized sighthound that is the fastest domesticated animal of its weight. Known as the poor man's racehorse in Victorian England.

name: Yorkshire Terrier
description: The Yorkshire Terrier is a small toy terrier with a gorgeous silky coat. Despite its glamorous appearance, it is a true terrier at heart: feisty and brave.

name: French Bulldog
description: The French Bulldog is a charming, adaptable companion with distinctive bat ears. One of the most popular small-dog breeds in the world.

name: Boxer
description: The Boxer is a medium to large short-haired breed developed in Germany. Playful, patient, and protective, making it an ideal family dog.

name: Great Pyrenees
description: The Great Pyrenees is a majestic, immensely powerful livestock guardian with a beautiful white weatherproof coat. An ancient breed from the Pyrenees Mountains.

name: Bernese Mountain Dog
description: The Bernese Mountain Dog is a large, sturdy worker from the Swiss Alps with a striking tricolor coat. Known for being gentle, affectionate, and eager to please.

name: Portuguese Water Dog
description: The Portuguese Water Dog is an athletic, loyal swimmer with a waterproof curly or wavy coat. Bred to assist Portuguese fishermen by herding fish and retrieving gear.

name: Vizsla
description: The Vizsla is a versatile, red-coated Hungarian hunting dog. Nicknamed the Velcro dog for its desire to be close to its owner at all times.

name: Belgian Malinois
description: The Belgian Malinois is a confident, smart herding dog favored for police and military work worldwide. Intensely loyal and driven.

name: Australian Cattle Dog
description: The Australian Cattle Dog is a sturdy, compact herding dog developed in Australia for droving cattle over long distances. Also known as the Blue Heeler.

name: Havanese
description: The Havanese is the national dog of Cuba and its only native breed. A cheerful little dog with a spring in its step and a silky, flowing coat.

name: Brittany
description: The Brittany is a versatile gundog that combines the best qualities of a pointer and a retriever. Originally from the Brittany province of France.

name: English Springer Spaniel
description: The English Springer Spaniel is a bird dog of great energy, stamina, and brains. Its compact body and long ears make it a tireless, loyal sporting companion.

name: Shetland Sheepdog
description: The Shetland Sheepdog is a small, agile herding dog from Scotland's Shetland Islands. Resembles a miniature Collie and is exceptionally intelligent and willing to please.

name: Miniature Schnauzer
description: The Miniature Schnauzer is a robust, sturdily built terrier with a distinctive beard and eyebrows. The most popular of the three Schnauzer breeds.

name: Cane Corso
description: The Cane Corso is a large Italian molosser known for its imposing appearance and protective nature. A descendant of the Roman war dogs of antiquity.

name: Miniature Pinscher
description: The Miniature Pinscher is a compact, elegant toy breed known as the King of Toys. Despite resembling a small Doberman, it is a much older breed.

name: Chinese Crested
description: The Chinese Crested comes in two varieties: hairless and powderpuff. A playful, loving companion that bonds intensely with its owner.

name: Xoloitzcuintli
description: The Xoloitzcuintli is an ancient Aztec dog breed that comes in hairless and coated varieties. Considered sacred by the Aztecs for over 3000 years.

name: Chihuahua
description: The Chihuahua is the smallest recognized dog breed, named after the Mexican state. A national symbol of Mexico with a saucy, confident personality.

name: Pharaoh Hound
description: The Pharaoh Hound is an elegant, powerful sighthound and the national dog of Malta. One of the few dogs that visibly blushes when excited.

name: Ibizan Hound
description: The Ibizan Hound is a lean, agile sighthound from the Balearic Islands of Spain. Known for its deer-like elegance and exceptional jumping ability.

name: Canaan Dog
description: The Canaan Dog is the national dog of Israel, a primitive pariah dog that has survived in the desert for thousands of years. Alert and territorial.

name: Thai Ridgeback
description: The Thai Ridgeback is a primitive breed from Thailand with a distinctive ridge of hair along its back. An ancient breed used for hunting and guarding.

name: Korean Jindo
description: The Korean Jindo is a spitz-type hunting dog from Jindo Island, South Korea. Designated as a national treasure of Korea for its unwavering loyalty.

name: Taiwan Dog
description: The Taiwan Dog is a small to medium breed native to Taiwan, descended from ancient South Asian hunting dogs. A highly loyal and versatile companion.

name: Azawakh
description: The Azawakh is a West African sighthound from the Sahel region. Lean and elegant, it was bred by Tuareg nomads as a guard and hunting dog.

name: Sloughi
description: The Sloughi is a North African sighthound also known as the Arabian Greyhound. A rare and ancient breed valued for its speed and hunting prowess.

name: Cirneco dell'Etna
description: The Cirneco dell'Etna is a small, sleek coursing hound from Sicily. An ancient breed that has hunted on the slopes of Mount Etna for thousands of years.

name: Finnish Spitz
description: The Finnish Spitz is the national dog of Finland, a lively fox-like breed originally used for hunting birds and small game by barking to alert the hunter.

name: Finnish Lapphund
description: The Finnish Lapphund is a hardy, easy-going herding dog from the Arctic regions of Scandinavia. Originally bred to herd reindeer by the Sami people.

name: Norwegian Elkhound
description: The Norwegian Elkhound is a bold, hardy spitz breed that has served as a hunter, guardian, and herder for Vikings for thousands of years.

name: Norwegian Lundehund
description: The Norwegian Lundehund is a unique spitz breed with six toes on each foot and extraordinary flexibility. Originally bred to hunt puffins on Norwegian cliffs.

name: Swedish Vallhund
description: The Swedish Vallhund is a sturdy, low-to-the-ground Viking dog that has been herding cattle for over a thousand years in Sweden.

name: Icelandic Sheepdog
description: The Icelandic Sheepdog is Iceland's only native breed, brought by the Vikings. A cheerful, friendly spitz that excels at herding sheep in rugged terrain.

name: Lagotto Romagnolo
description: The Lagotto Romagnolo is an Italian water dog now famous as the world's foremost truffle-hunting breed. Has a curly, waterproof coat.

name: Spinone Italiano
description: The Spinone Italiano is one of Italy's oldest pointing breeds, a muscular all-purpose hunting dog known for its wiry coat and gentle, sociable nature.

name: Bracco Italiano
description: The Bracco Italiano is one of the oldest European pointing breeds, prized for its powerful nose and distinctive trot. A gentle and devoted companion.

name: German Shorthaired Pointer
description: The German Shorthaired Pointer is a versatile hunter and all-purpose gun dog. An enthusiastic, bold, and instinctively cooperative sporting breed.

name: German Wirehaired Pointer
description: The German Wirehaired Pointer is a sturdy, well-muscled gundog with a distinctive wiry coat that protects it from rough cover, water, and weather.

name: Wirehaired Vizsla
description: The Wirehaired Vizsla is a versatile Hungarian hunting dog with a dense wiry coat that offers more protection than its smooth-coated cousin.

name: Curly-Coated Retriever
description: The Curly-Coated Retriever is the tallest of the retrievers and one of the oldest, distinguished by its mass of tight, crisp curls. An excellent waterfowl dog.

name: Flat-Coated Retriever
description: The Flat-Coated Retriever is a happy, optimistic gundog with a distinctive sleek black or liver coat. Known as the Peter Pan of the dog world for its puppy-like attitude.

name: Chesapeake Bay Retriever
description: The Chesapeake Bay Retriever is a powerful, intensely loyal American gundog bred to retrieve waterfowl in the frigid, rough waters of the Chesapeake Bay.

name: Nova Scotia Duck Tolling Retriever
description: The Nova Scotia Duck Tolling Retriever is the smallest of the retrievers. It lures waterfowl within gunshot range by playing along the shoreline, then retrieves them.

name: Irish Wolfhound
description: The Irish Wolfhound is the tallest of all dog breeds. Originally bred to hunt wolves in Ireland, it is now a gentle giant known for its serene disposition.

name: Scottish Deerhound
description: The Scottish Deerhound is a tall, majestic coursing hound bred to stalk the giant wild red deer of Scotland. Known as the Royal Dog of Scotland.

name: Greyhound
description: The Greyhound is the fastest dog breed in the world, capable of reaching speeds up to 72 km/h. Despite its racing reputation, it is a gentle, calm companion.

name: Bloodhound
description: The Bloodhound is a large scent hound with the most powerful nose in the dog kingdom. Its trailing abilities are so precise that evidence it finds is admissible in court.

name: Basset Hound
description: The Basset Hound is a short-legged scent hound with long ears and a melancholy expression. Despite its droopy appearance, it is a tenacious and determined tracker.

name: Petit Basset Griffon Vendeen
description: The Petit Basset Griffon Vendeen is a small, rough-coated French scent hound bred to hunt rabbits in the Vendee region. Bold and vivacious.

name: Bull Terrier
description: The Bull Terrier is a muscular, big-boned terrier with a unique egg-shaped head. A playful, charming, and sometimes comical companion.

name: Staffordshire Bull Terrier
description: The Staffordshire Bull Terrier is a muscular, courageous breed known for its love of people, especially children. Nicknamed the nanny dog in the UK.

name: Airedale Terrier
description: The Airedale Terrier is the largest of all terrier breeds, known as the King of Terriers. A versatile breed used for hunting, war service, and police work.

name: West Highland White Terrier
description: The West Highland White Terrier is a sturdy little dog with a distinctive white coat. Originally bred in Scotland to hunt rats and other underground prey.

name: Cairn Terrier
description: The Cairn Terrier is one of Scotland's earliest working dogs, bred to root out foxes from cairns. Made famous by Toto in The Wizard of Oz.

name: Norwich Terrier
description: The Norwich Terrier is one of the smallest working terriers with prick ears that distinguish it from the drop-eared Norfolk Terrier.

name: Norfolk Terrier
description: The Norfolk Terrier is a small, portable, game terrier known for its drop ears. One of the smallest working terriers, with a fearless yet lovable disposition.

name: Wire Fox Terrier
description: The Wire Fox Terrier is a lively, quick terrier with a distinctive wiry coat. The most decorated breed at the Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show.

name: Border Terrier
description: The Border Terrier is a tough, no-frills working terrier from the Anglo-Scottish border. Its otter-shaped head and wiry coat are distinctive features.

name: Soft Coated Wheaten Terrier
description: The Soft Coated Wheaten Terrier is a medium-sized, hardy Irish farm dog. Known for its silky, gently waving wheat-colored coat and exuberant greeting style.

name: Kerry Blue Terrier
description: The Kerry Blue Terrier is a versatile Irish breed with a distinctive blue-gray curly coat. Originally used for herding, guarding, and hunting on Irish farms.

name: Irish Terrier
description: The Irish Terrier is a bold, dashing, courageous dog known as the daredevil of the terrier group. One of the oldest terrier breeds with a fiery red coat.

name: American Staffordshire Terrier
description: The American Staffordshire Terrier is a muscular, stocky, yet agile dog. Known for its courage and loyalty, it is a trustworthy family companion.

name: Old English Sheepdog
description: The Old English Sheepdog is a big, athletic dog with a shaggy coat that covers its entire body including the eyes. Known for its distinctive bear-like shuffle.

name: Collie
description: The Collie is an elegant herding dog made famous by the character Lassie. A devoted family dog known for its intelligence and loyalty.

name: Cardigan Welsh Corgi
description: The Cardigan Welsh Corgi is the older of the two Corgi breeds, distinguished by its long tail. A sturdy, versatile herding dog from Wales.

name: Pembroke Welsh Corgi
description: The Pembroke Welsh Corgi is the favorite breed of Queen Elizabeth II. A low-set, sturdy herding dog with a foxy face and affectionate personality.

name: Bouvier des Flandres
description: The Bouvier des Flandres is a powerfully built Belgian herding dog with a rugged, weather-resistant coat. Originally used for farm work in Flanders.

name: Briard
description: The Briard is a large French herding dog with a long, flowing coat and distinctive beard. Known as a heart wrapped in fur for its loving nature.

name: Beauceron
description: The Beauceron is a large, athletic French herding breed with distinctive double dewclaws. A versatile working dog used by French military and police.

name: Berger Picard
description: The Berger Picard is a rare French herding breed with a shaggy, rustic appearance and erect ears. Nearly extinct after both World Wars.

name: Komondor
description: The Komondor is a large Hungarian livestock guardian with a distinctive white corded coat resembling dreadlocks. An imposing and powerful protector.

name: Kuvasz
description: The Kuvasz is a majestic Hungarian livestock guardian with a dense white coat. An ancient breed that once guarded the estates of Hungarian nobles.

name: Puli
description: The Puli is a small-medium Hungarian herding breed famous for its tightly corded coat. An agile, smart, and dedicated working dog.

name: Leonberger
description: The Leonberger is a giant breed created in the city of Leonberg, Germany, as a lion-like companion. A gentle, playful, and waterproof family dog.

name: Greater Swiss Mountain Dog
description: The Greater Swiss Mountain Dog is a large, muscular tricolor breed and the oldest of the four Swiss mountain dog breeds. A versatile draft and drover dog.

name: Entlebucher Mountain Dog
description: The Entlebucher Mountain Dog is the smallest of the four Swiss mountain dog breeds. An energetic, loyal herding dog with a tricolor coat.

name: Appenzeller Sennenhund
description: The Appenzeller Sennenhund is a versatile Swiss mountain dog bred for herding cattle and general farm work. One of four Swiss mountain dog breeds.

name: Anatolian Shepherd Dog
description: The Anatolian Shepherd Dog is an ancient Turkish livestock guardian with incredible endurance. Bred to protect flocks from wolves, bears, and jackals.

name: Central Asian Shepherd Dog
description: The Central Asian Shepherd Dog is one of the oldest livestock guardian breeds, existing for over 5000 years. A powerful, independent protector.

name: Caucasian Shepherd Dog
description: The Caucasian Shepherd Dog is a massive, powerful guardian breed from the Caucasus Mountains. Bred for centuries to protect livestock from predators.

name: Dogo Argentino
description: The Dogo Argentino is a large, white, muscular dog developed in Argentina for big-game hunting including wild boar and puma.

name: Fila Brasileiro
description: The Fila Brasileiro is a large Brazilian molosser known for its tracking ability and aggressive temperament toward strangers. Fiercely loyal to its family.

name: Peruvian Inca Orchid
description: The Peruvian Inca Orchid is an ancient hairless breed from Peru, prized by the Inca civilization. Comes in three sizes, both hairless and coated varieties.

name: American Water Spaniel
description: The American Water Spaniel is the state dog of Wisconsin, developed as an all-around hunting dog for the Great Lakes region. A versatile and enthusiastic retriever.

name: Keeshond
description: The Keeshond is the national dog of the Netherlands, a sturdy spitz with a plush silver and black coat. Known for its spectacular markings around the eyes.

name: Schipperke
description: The Schipperke is a small, thickset Belgian breed that served as a watchdog and rat catcher on canal barges. Known for its distinctive black coat and foxy face.

name: Bichon Frise
description: The Bichon Frise is a cheerful, small dog with a powder-puff white coat. A charming, adaptable companion originally from the Mediterranean region.

name: Lowchen
description: The Lowchen, or Little Lion Dog, is a rare breed traditionally given a lion-trim haircut. A playful and gentle companion that has been popular in Europe since the Renaissance.

name: Coton de Tulear
description: The Coton de Tulear is the national dog of Madagascar, named for its cotton-like coat and the port city of Tulear. A charming, witty companion.

name: Tibetan Spaniel
description: The Tibetan Spaniel is a small, assertive breed that served as a watchdog in Tibetan monasteries. Despite its name, it is not a true spaniel.

name: Tibetan Terrier
description: The Tibetan Terrier is not actually a terrier but a herding breed considered a good luck charm in Tibet. Known for its large, flat snowshoe-like feet.

name: Japanese Chin
description: The Japanese Chin is an elegant toy breed with a distinctive aristocratic bearing. A charming companion that has been prized by Japanese royalty for centuries.

name: Japanese Spitz
description: The Japanese Spitz is a small companion dog with a pure white fluffy coat. Developed in Japan in the 1920s as a cheerful, loyal family dog.

name: Kai Ken
description: The Kai Ken is a rare Japanese breed with a distinctive brindle coat. A natural hunter from the mountainous Kai province, prized for its devotion.

name: Kishu Ken
description: The Kishu Ken is an ancient Japanese spitz breed from the Kishu region. A quiet, calm, and one-person hunting dog designated a national treasure in Japan.

name: Hokkaido
description: The Hokkaido is a medium-sized Japanese breed brought to Hokkaido by the Ainu people. Known for withstanding cold and heavy snowfall, and for its fierce loyalty.

name: Tosa Inu
description: The Tosa Inu is a large Japanese breed originally bred as a fighting dog. The sumo wrestler of the dog world, known for its calm and patient demeanor.

name: Pungsan Dog
description: The Pungsan Dog is a hunting breed from the mountainous Pungsan region of North Korea. Known for endurance, bravery, and the ability to hunt large game in harsh terrain.

name: Sapsali
description: The Sapsali is a shaggy Korean breed once believed to dispel ghosts and evil spirits. Nearly extinct after the Japanese occupation, now a Korean national treasure.

name: Indian Pariah Dog
description: The Indian Pariah Dog is one of the oldest and most primitive dog breeds on earth. A naturally evolved landrace, extremely healthy and well-adapted to Indian climate.

name: Mudhol Hound
description: The Mudhol Hound is a sighthound breed from the Deccan Plateau region of India. A graceful, swift hunter used by Indian royalty for centuries.

name: Rajapalayam
description: The Rajapalayam is a large Indian sighthound from Tamil Nadu, known for its pure white coat and pink nose. Once used as a companion in boar hunting and as a guard dog.

name: Kanni
description: The Kanni is a rare South Indian sighthound traditionally given as a wedding gift. Its name means maiden in Tamil, symbolizing purity and faithfulness.

name: Afghan Shepherd
description: The Afghan Shepherd, or Kuchi Dog, is a large livestock guardian breed used by the Kuchi nomads of Afghanistan. A powerful and territorial protector.

name: Kangal
description: The Kangal is Turkey's national dog, a powerful livestock guardian with the strongest bite force of any domestic dog breed. Calm and protective.

name: Catalburun
description: The Catalburun is one of only three dog breeds in the world with a split nose. An extremely rare Turkish pointer known for exceptional scenting ability.

name: Telomian
description: The Telomian is the only Malaysian dog breed known to the Western world. A primitive breed originally kept by the Orang Asli people to control vermin.

name: Askal
description: The Askal, or Aspin, is the native dog of the Philippines. A hardy, naturally evolved landrace known for its intelligence and adaptability to tropical climates.

name: New Guinea Singing Dog
description: The New Guinea Singing Dog is named for its unique harmonic vocalization. One of the rarest and most primitive canines, closely related to the wild dingo.

name: Thai Bangkaew Dog
description: The Thai Bangkaew Dog is a spitz-type breed from the Bangkaew village in Thailand. An agile, active companion with a thick double coat.

name: Boerboel
description: The Boerboel is a large, mastiff-type dog from South Africa developed to guard homesteads. One of the most powerful dog breeds with a calm, stable temperament.

name: Africanis
description: The Africanis is a naturally evolved landrace dog from southern Africa with a lean, athletic build. Extremely healthy due to thousands of years of natural selection.

name: Coton de Reunion
description: The Coton de Reunion is a small companion dog from the French island of Reunion in the Indian Ocean. An ancestor of the Coton de Tulear, now extremely rare.

name: Chinese Chongqing Dog
description: The Chinese Chongqing Dog is a rare breed from China's Chongqing municipality. Descended from ancient Chinese hunting and guard dogs with over 2000 years of history.

name: Kunming Wolfdog
description: The Kunming Wolfdog is a Chinese breed developed as a military and police working dog. Similar in appearance to the German Shepherd but a distinct breed.

name: Mudi
description: The Mudi is a versatile Hungarian herding breed with a distinctive curly or wavy coat. A rare breed that excels at herding, agility, and search and rescue.

name: Croatian Sheepdog
description: The Croatian Sheepdog is an ancient herding breed with a distinctive curly black coat. One of the oldest breeds in the Balkans, dating back to the 7th century.

name: Tornjak
description: The Tornjak is a large livestock guardian from Bosnia and Herzegovina, mentioned in historical documents from the 9th century. Calm and friendly with family.

name: Sarplaninac
description: The Sarplaninac is a large livestock guardian from the Sar Mountains of the Balkans. A calm, devoted protector that bonds deeply with its flock.

name: Estrela Mountain Dog
description: The Estrela Mountain Dog is Portugal's oldest breed, a large guardian from the Serra da Estrela mountains. Known for its loyalty and protective instincts.

name: Spanish Mastiff
description: The Spanish Mastiff is a giant livestock guardian from Spain, historically used to protect Merino sheep during transhumance. One of the heaviest dog breeds.

name: Spanish Water Dog
description: The Spanish Water Dog is a versatile working breed from the Iberian Peninsula with a distinctive curly, woolly coat. Excels at herding, retrieving, and water work.

name: Portuguese Podengo
description: The Portuguese Podengo Pequeno is a small, primitive sighthound from Portugal. A lively and charming hunter that comes in wire and smooth coat varieties.

name: Barbet
description: The Barbet is a rare French water dog with a thick, curly, waterproof coat. An archetypical water dog that is the ancestor of many modern breeds.

name: Danish-Swedish Farmdog
description: The Danish-Swedish Farmdog is a compact, lively breed from Scandinavia. Originally a versatile farm dog used for ratting, herding, and as a companion.

name: Norrbottenspets
description: The Norrbottenspets is a small Nordic spitz from northern Sweden. Once thought extinct, it was rediscovered in remote villages and is now used for hunting.

name: Karelian Bear Dog
description: The Karelian Bear Dog is a Finnish spitz breed used for hunting large game including bears and moose. A fearless, dedicated hunting companion.

name: Lapponian Herder
description: The Lapponian Herder is a medium-sized Finnish reindeer herding dog from Lapland. A calmer, more obedient alternative to the Finnish Lapphund.

name: Russian Toy
description: The Russian Toy is one of the smallest dog breeds in the world. Developed in Russia, it comes in smooth and long-haired varieties with distinctive feathered ears.

name: Black Russian Terrier
description: The Black Russian Terrier was developed by Soviet military scientists as a guard dog. Despite its name, it is not a true terrier but a powerful working breed.

name: South Russian Ovcharka
description: The South Russian Ovcharka is a large livestock guardian from the Ukrainian steppe. Despite its fluffy white appearance, it is a fierce and territorial protector.

name: Stabyhoun
description: The Stabyhoun is one of the rarest dog breeds in the world, originating from the Friesland province of the Netherlands. A gentle and versatile all-around farm dog.

name: Nederlandse Kooikerhondje
description: The Nederlandse Kooikerhondje is a small Dutch sporting breed that lured ducks into traps called koois. Known for its distinctive orange-red and white coat.

name: Perro de Presa Canario
description: The Perro de Presa Canario is a mastiff-type dog from the Canary Islands. Originally bred for working livestock, it is a powerful and confident guardian.

name: Bolognese
description: The Bolognese is a small, white, fluffy companion breed from Bologna, Italy. A devoted lap dog cherished by Italian nobility since the Renaissance.

name: Volpino Italiano
description: The Volpino Italiano is a small Italian spitz breed adored by Italian royalty and Renaissance artists. Nearly extinct in the 1960s, now slowly recovering.

name: Maremma Sheepdog
description: The Maremma Sheepdog is an Italian livestock guardian from the Maremma region of Tuscany. A noble, independent protector used to guard sheep for centuries.

name: Polish Lowland Sheepdog
description: The Polish Lowland Sheepdog is a shaggy, medium-sized herding dog from Poland. Known for its excellent memory and self-assured, sometimes willful personality.

name: Tatra Shepherd Dog
description: The Tatra Shepherd Dog is a large, white livestock guardian from the Tatra Mountains of Poland. A calm, composed dog with strong protective instincts.

name: Czechoslovakian Vlcak
description: The Czechoslovakian Vlcak is a wolfdog breed created by crossing German Shepherds with Carpathian wolves in a 1955 military experiment. Versatile and wolf-like in appearance.

name: German Spitz
description: The German Spitz is a classic Northern breed and ancestor of many modern spitz-type dogs. A devoted, lively companion with a beautiful plume tail.

name: Eurasier
description: The Eurasier is a German spitz-type breed created by crossing Chow Chow, Wolfspitz, and Samoyed. A balanced, calm family dog that bonds closely with its owner.

name: American Eskimo Dog
description: The American Eskimo Dog is a beautiful white spitz breed that comes in three sizes. Despite its name, it was developed from German Spitz stock in the United States.

name: American Foxhound
description: The American Foxhound is one of the rarest AKC breeds, descended from hounds brought by English settlers. George Washington was an avid breeder of the American Foxhound.

name: Catahoula Leopard Dog
description: The Catahoula Leopard Dog is the state dog of Louisiana, named after Catahoula Parish. Known for its striking merle coat, glass eyes, and webbed feet.

name: Boykin Spaniel
description: The Boykin Spaniel is the state dog of South Carolina, developed for hunting wild turkeys and ducks from a boat. A versatile, energetic sporting breed.

name: Plott Hound
description: The Plott Hound is the state dog of North Carolina, the only coonhound that does not trace its ancestry to the English Foxhound. A tenacious big-game hunter.

name: Rat Terrier
description: The Rat Terrier is a multipurpose farm dog named by Teddy Roosevelt. An American breed that excels at ratting and is a friendly, feisty companion.

name: Redbone Coonhound
description: The Redbone Coonhound is a handsome, flashy red American hound known for its versatility and pleading expression. Featured in the novel Where the Red Fern Grows.

name: Treeing Walker Coonhound
description: The Treeing Walker Coonhound is a tricolored American hound descended from the English Foxhound. One of the most popular coonhound breeds for competitive hunting.

name: Blue Lacy
description: The Blue Lacy is the state dog of Texas, bred by the Lacy brothers in the mid-19th century. A versatile working dog used for herding, hunting, and ranching.

name: Alaskan Klee Kai
description: The Alaskan Klee Kai is a spitz-type breed developed in the 1970s as a companion-sized version of the Alaskan Husky. Small, energetic, and striking.

name: Chinook
description: The Chinook is the official state dog of New Hampshire, developed as a sled and draft dog. One of the rarest breeds, known for its gentle and willing temperament.

name: German Pinscher
description: The German Pinscher is a medium-sized, sleek German breed and the progenitor of the Doberman and Miniature Pinscher. An energetic and alert working dog.

name: Bedlington Terrier
description: The Bedlington Terrier resembles a lamb with its distinctive pear-shaped head and curly coat. A graceful, versatile terrier originally bred for hunting in mines.

name: Irish Water Spaniel
description: The Irish Water Spaniel is the tallest of the spaniels, distinguished by its curly liver-colored coat and distinctive rat tail. An energetic and clownish water retriever.

name: Field Spaniel
description: The Field Spaniel is a medium-sized, well-balanced sporting dog. Once nearly extinct, this gentle breed has been carefully restored by devoted breeders.

name: Clumber Spaniel
description: The Clumber Spaniel is the largest of the spaniel breeds, a dignified sporting dog favored by British royalty. Calm and devoted but with a mischievous streak.

name: Sussex Spaniel
description: The Sussex Spaniel is a rare, low-set sporting breed from Sussex, England. The only spaniel to bay while working, with a distinctive rich golden-liver coat.

name: Gordon Setter
description: The Gordon Setter is the heaviest and most powerful of the setter breeds, with a distinctive black and tan coat. A loyal, devoted sporting companion from Scotland.

name: English Setter
description: The English Setter is an elegant, graceful gundog known for its beautiful speckled coat called belton. One of the oldest gundog breeds, mellow and gentle.

name: Cesky Terrier
description: The Cesky Terrier is a rare, silky-coated terrier created in Czechoslovakia by crossing Scottish and Sealyham Terriers. One of the world's rarest breeds.

name: Glen of Imaal Terrier
description: The Glen of Imaal Terrier is a sturdy, low-slung Irish terrier from the Glen of Imaal in County Wicklow. A tough, spirited dog with a gentle disposition.

name: Dandie Dinmont Terrier
description: The Dandie Dinmont Terrier is a uniquely shaped terrier named after a character in a Sir Walter Scott novel. One of the most endangered native British breeds.

name: Sealyham Terrier
description: The Sealyham Terrier is a rare Welsh terrier once the most popular terrier breed. A sturdy, outgoing, and adaptable companion with a wry sense of humor.

name: Skye Terrier
description: The Skye Terrier is a distinctive breed from the Isle of Skye with a long, flowing coat. One of the most endangered native British breeds, known for its unwavering loyalty.

name: Lakeland Terrier
description: The Lakeland Terrier is a sturdy, workmanlike terrier from the Lake District of England. Bred to hunt foxes that preyed on sheep in the rugged fells.

name: Manchester Terrier
description: The Manchester Terrier is a sleek, spirited rat-catching terrier from Manchester, England. The oldest identifiable terrier breed, elegant and athletic.

name: Grand Basset Griffon Vendeen
description: The Grand Basset Griffon Vendeen is a French hound breed with a rough coat and long ears. Bred for hunting hare in the Vendee region of western France.

name: Otterhound
description: The Otterhound is one of the most endangered dog breeds with fewer than 800 worldwide. A large, rough-coated British hound originally bred to hunt otters.

name: Harrier
description: The Harrier is a medium-sized English pack hound used for hunting hares. Resembles a smaller version of the English Foxhound with a sweet, friendly nature.

name: Bergamasco Sheepdog
description: The Bergamasco Sheepdog has a unique coat composed of three types of hair that form felt-like mats or flocks. An ancient Italian herding breed from the Alps.

name: Wirehaired Pointing Griffon
description: The Wirehaired Pointing Griffon is a versatile gundog known as the supreme gun dog. Developed by Eduard Korthals, it excels at pointing and retrieving in any terrain.
